headline: Trump slams NATO allies for not joining Iran war effort, says U.S. never needed their help
summary: Trump, a longtime NATO critic, said he sees the alliance as a "one way street — We will protect them, but they will do nothing for us."

raw.headline: Trump slams NATO allies for not joining Iran war effort, says U.S. never needed their help
raw.summary: Trump, a longtime NATO critic, said he sees the alliance as a "one way street — We will protect them, but they will do nothing for us."

headline: Huntington Ingalls Secures a Contract to Support USS Nimitz
summary: HII lands a $95.7M Navy contract tied to USS Nimitz inactivation, adding to its strong backlog and positioning amid rising global naval defense spending.

raw.headline: Huntington Ingalls Secures a Contract to Support USS Nimitz

headline: U.S. counterterrorism director Joe Kent resigns over war: 'Iran posed no imminent threat'
summary: "Iran posed no imminent threat to our nation," Kent wrote in his letter to President Donald Trump.

raw.headline: U.S. counterterrorism director Joe Kent resigns over war: 'Iran posed no imminent threat'

headline: Why Defense-Contractor Stocks Aren’t Rallying
summary: War should result in higher military spending, but things aren’t so simple for the biggest weapons makers.

headline: Gecko Robotics brings its AI to U.S. Navy ship repair in latest next-gen defense tech deal
summary: CEO Jake Loosararian said Gecko is supporting the Navy's push to have 80% fleet readiness by 2027.
